<div class="autornaseq-doc">
  <section class="doc-hero">
    <span class="doc-chip">Latest Release</span>
    <h1>About AutoRNAseq</h1>
    <p>AutoRNAseq is a user-friendly, end-to-end RNA-Seq analysis platform for interactive preprocessing, differential expression, downstream functional interpretation, and machine learning-based biomarker discovery. The latest release is built for smoother real-world use, clearer help guidance at every step, a darker high-contrast interface, and safer handling of user-provided data.</p>
  </section>

  <section class="doc-block">
    <h2>What This Version Includes</h2>
    <div class="doc-grid">
      <div><h3>Core RNA-Seq Flow</h3><p>Data setup, quality control, filtering and trimming, alignment, quantification, and differential expression analysis.</p></div>
      <div><h3>Downstream Biology</h3><p>GO enrichment, KEGG pathways, GSEA, PPI network analysis, and biomarker prioritization with machine learning.</p></div>
      <div><h3>Built-in Guidance</h3><p>Every major analysis step now includes a Help button that explains expected file types, required columns, and practical data size tips.</p></div>
      <div><h3>Reliability Improvements</h3><p>Startup fixes, stronger input validation, clearer error messages, and a more robust Docker-based deployment.</p></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="doc-block">
    <h2>Why It Is Easier To Use</h2>
    <p>The interface is designed to guide users from raw input files to downstream results without requiring them to guess which file format or sample layout is expected. Help dialogs now describe the exact data requirements for each module, and the automated pipeline is structured to fail gracefully with actionable messages when something is missing.</p>
  </section>

  <section class="doc-block">
    <h2>Licensing</h2>
    <p>GNU General Public License (GPL-3.0).</p>
  </section>

  <section class="doc-block">
    <h2>Code and Citation</h2>
    <p>Portfolio: <a href="https://harisbio.github.io/" target="_blank">harisbio.github.io</a></p>
    <p>Author: Muhammad Haris — Department of Bioinformatics and Biotechnology, Government College University Faisalabad, Pakistan</p>
    <p>Contact: <a href="mailto:mharis.202101862@gcuf.edu.pk">mharis.202101862@gcuf.edu.pk</a></p>
    <p>Use the following in R to retrieve citation details:</p>
    <pre><code>citation("AutoRNAseq")</code></pre>
  </section>

  <section class="doc-block">
    <h2>Session Info</h2>
    <p>Technical runtime information is shown below this section in the app so users can confirm the package version and loaded environment.</p>
  </section>
</div>
